eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Fayette; Ohio; Daviess; Madison; Franklin, KY; at 8:37 PM on AUG 31, 2019 Effective until 8:52 PM. Message from KYEOC.
